positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed minimalist celestial forest scene. Giant bioluminescent mushrooms form glowing pillars, intertwined with abstract, flowing nebula patterns and delicate fern-like cosmic flora. The composition is centered, featuring deep indigo and vibrant emerald green contrasted with warm, glowing amber light emanating from the flora and under the mushrooms. Use a clean silhouette style reminiscent of vintage etchings mixed with modern psychedelic art. Flat lay, vector illustration quality, high contrast, designed for screen printing on a dark background. Dramatic spotlighting from the glowing elements. Whimsical, ethereal, high saturation, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, deformed, extra limbs, low detail, noise, cartoon, photorealism, jpeg artifacts, messy, busy background
